rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Winnti Dropper Activity
id: 130c9e58-28ac-4f83-8574-0a4cc913b97e
status: test
description: Detects files dropped by Winnti as described in RedMimicry Winnti playbook
references:
- https://redmimicry.com/posts/redmimicry-winnti/#dropper
author: Alexander Rausch
date: 2020-06-24
modified: 2023-01-05
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1027
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - \gthread-3.6.dll
    - \sigcmm-2.4.dll
    - \Windows\Temp\tmp.bat
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
